title: Maria Kuruvilla
text:
About
Welcome! I am a quantitative ecologist who is interested in using available data and statistical methods to answer ecological questions. I am currently a postdoc at University of Victoria investigating the interactions between forestry and salmon.

title: publications
text:
The effect of temperature on fish swimming and schooling is context dependent (Kuruvilla et al. 2022)





References

Kuruvilla, Maria, Anthony Dell, Ashley R. Olson, Jason Knouft, John M. Grady, Jacob Forbes, and Andrew M. Berdahl. 2022. “The Effect of Temperature on Fish Swimming and Schooling Is Context Dependent.” Oikos 2023 (2). https://doi.org/10.1111/oik.09202.
